article_theme: The contrasting market designs of PJM and ERCOT demonstrate how AI datacenter load growth exposes the costly flaws of centralized capacity forecasting versus the efficiency of real-time scarcity pricing.
structure_summary: The article begins by introducing the controversy over AI datacenters raising power bills, then structurally contrasts the two largest US energy markets: PJM (focusing on its flawed, expensive capacity market) and ERCOT (highlighting its efficient, energy-only real-time market). It uses Winter Storm Fern as a comparative case study to prove its thesis, and concludes with future regulatory outlooks and investment implications for specific market players.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.next_section_title: Are AI Datacenters Increasing Electric Bills for American Households?
sections.section_role: Sets the analytical stage and introduces the core thesis comparing PJM's flawed capacity design with ERCOT's efficiency.
translation_notes: Ensure clear distinction between 'capacity prices' (容量价格) and general 'power prices' (电价).
Maintain an authoritative, analytical tone suitable for institutional investors.

sections.title: Are AI Datacenters Increasing Electric Bills for American Households?
sections.next_section_title: Capacity: paying for power plants to sit idle 95% of the time
sections.section_role: Hooks the reader by addressing the mainstream narrative blaming AI datacenters for bill hikes, while contextualizing the geographic overlap of AI hubs and PJM.
translation_notes: Translate 'finger-pointing' idiomatically (e.g., 互相指责 / 甩锅) while keeping the professional context.
Ensure accurate translation of financial terms like 'futures brokerage and clearing firm' (期货经纪与清算公司).

sections.title: Capacity: paying for power plants to sit idle 95% of the time
sections.previous_section_title: Are AI Datacenters Increasing Electric Bills for American Households?
sections.section_role: Provides the foundational technical education on market structures, contrasting capacity markets with energy-only markets.
translation_notes: Crucial terminology: 'energy-only market' (单一电量市场 / 仅电能市场) vs. 'capacity auction' (容量拍卖).
Ensure 'real-time pricing signals determine scarcity' is translated to emphasize market mechanics (实时价格信号决定稀缺性).

sections.title: PJM: The $16 Billion Simulation
sections.previous_section_title: Capacity: paying for power plants to sit idle 95% of the time
sections.next_section_title: ERCOT: Same Load Growth, No Price Shock
sections.section_role: Critiques PJM's centralized forecasting model, quantifying the financial damage caused by its structural flaws.
translation_notes: Translate 'central planner' carefully (集中规划者 / 中央调度机构) to fit grid operations rather than macro-communism.
The title '$16 Billion Simulation' implies artificial, model-driven costs; preserve this nuance (160亿美元的模拟游戏 / 模拟测算).

sections.title: ERCOT: Same Load Growth, No Price Shock
sections.next_section_title: Winter Storm Fern: Paying for Reliability vs. Delivering It
sections.section_role: Presents ERCOT as the successful control group, proving that rapid load growth does not necessitate price shocks if the market design is correct.
translation_notes: Accurate acronyms: 'FERC jurisdiction' (联邦能源管理委员会管辖权).
'Unified market mechanism' should be translated as 统一市场机制.

sections.title: Winter Storm Fern: Paying for Reliability vs. Delivering It
sections.previous_section_title: ERCOT: Same Load Growth, No Price Shock
sections.section_role: Serves as the empirical case study, stress-testing both market designs under extreme weather to prove the thesis.
translation_notes: Annotate or accurately translate 'BRA' (Base Residual Auction - 基础剩余拍卖).
Legal precision required for 'Section 202(c) of the Federal Power Act' (《联邦电力法》第202(c)条).

sections.title: What Comes Next
sections.previous_section_title: Winter Storm Fern: Paying for Reliability vs. Delivering It
sections.next_section_title: Winners & losers and the shifting market bottlenecks
sections.section_role: Analyzes the political and regulatory aftermath, projecting long-term structural advantages for ERCOT.
translation_notes: Translate 'Non-Capacity-Backed Load (NCBL)' as 无容量支持负荷, and 'ANOPR' as 拟议规则制定预先通知.
Preserve the investment-focused tone of 'structural asymmetry is durable and investable' (结构性不对称是持久的且具有投资价值).

sections.title: Winners & losers and the shifting market bottlenecks
sections.section_role: Monetizes the thesis for the paid tier by identifying specific equities, vendors, and developers positioned to benefit or suffer.
translation_notes: Ensure 'IPPs' is translated as 独立发电商 (Independent Power Producers).
Translate 'shifting constraints/bottlenecks' accurately in a supply-chain and grid context (不断变化的约束/瓶颈).

sections.title: Disclaimers
sections.previous_section_title: Winners & losers and the shifting market bottlenecks
sections.section_role: Provides a structural header separating the editorial content from legal boilerplate.
translation_notes: Translate simply as 免责声明.

sections.title: SemiAnalysis Disclaimer
sections.section_role: Protects the authors and publishers from financial liability and certifies research independence.
translation_notes: Use precise financial/legal boilerplate translation for 'Analyst Certifications and Independence of Research' (分析师认证与研究独立性).
